CalculateGeometryAttributes tol2 "area AREA_GEODESIC" # 平方米 GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] 与输入相同

CalculateGeometryAttributes tol2 "area AREA_GEODESIC" # 平方千米 GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] 与输入相同

CalculateGeometryAttributes tol2 "area AREA_GEODESIC" # 平方米 GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] 与输入相同
